title: BEM-879 worker review
objective:
Create file governance/audit/internal/results/BEM879_WORKER_PROTOCOL_V17_REVIEW.md with content # BEM-879 WORKER PROTOCOL V1.7 REVIEW
Status: WORKER_REVIEW_READY
Findings:
- Operator remark is valid. Worker should not be described as having minimum one internal contour when the roadmap is intended for parallel execution.
- The table 9 roadmap contains a maximum useful parallel width of 3.
- The first width-3 zone appears after P0-REG-001: architecture registry, rule registry, and event log can be built in parallel.
- The second width-3 zone appears after P1-DIR-001: Director rules contour, Director planning contour, and Worker object can be built in parallel.
- Later stages have width 2 or 1, therefore more than 3 Worker internal contours does not shorten the critical path.
- Two contours are not enough because one of each width-3 branch waits.
Decision:
- Optimal Worker internal contour count for this roadmap is 3.
- Worker should be created with Curator plus 3 internal contours.
Recommended contours:
- WRK-C1: Registry and architecture contour.
- WRK-C2: Rules and communication contour.
- WRK-C3: Implementation, workspace, product-link, and assigned testing contour.
Testing rule:
- Testing remains an assigned function in testing workspace. It is not a permanent separate testing contour. Curator assigns a non-authoring contour when independent check is needed.
Recommendation:
- Approve protocol v1.7 with notes and update roadmap task P1-WRK-001 accordingly.
No issue comments.
